# AI discovery endpoints for Nayab Seeds
# This file is referenced in robots.txt for LLM crawlers.
# It lists the URLs that are safe for large language model indexing.

# Home page – primary brand content
https://nayabseeds.pk/

# Shop page – product listings
https://nayabseeds.pk/shop

# Education page – plant guides and tutorials
https://nayabseeds.pk/education

# Blog page – learning hub articles
https://nayabseeds.pk/blog

# About page – brand story and mission
https://nayabseeds.pk/about

# Contact page – support and policies
https://nayabseeds.pk/contact
